message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Late Delivery – Order #[Insert Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction regarding the status of my recent order, #[Insert Order Number], which was placed on [Insert Date of Purchase].

Regrettably, the package arrived on [Insert Date of Delivery], which is two weeks later than the estimated delivery date of [Insert Estimated Delivery Date]. Furthermore, upon opening the package, I discovered that the item(s) inside were significantly damaged. Specifically, [describe the damage in detail, e.g., the box was crushed, the item was cracked, the contents were missing, etc.].

This delay and the poor condition of the delivery are unacceptable, particularly given that I paid for [mention if you paid for expedited shipping or if it was standard shipping with a guaranteed date, if applicable]. The late arrival has caused considerable inconvenience, and the damage renders the product unusable.

To resolve this matter promptly, I request one of the following remedies:
1. A full refund of the purchase price, including shipping costs; or
2. An immediate replacement of the damaged item(s) with expedited shipping at no additional cost to me.

Attached to this email, please find photographic evidence of the damaged packaging and the item(s) themselves, as well as a copy of the original order confirmation and the shipping notification showing the delayed delivery date.

I expect a response within [e.g., 3-5] business days regarding how you intend to resolve this issue. I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [length of time, e.g., several years] and hope to resolve this matter amicably and quickly so that I may continue to do business with you in the future.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this serious matter.

Sincerely
